title: Capitaland sells ITPC Chennai to Mindspace, 360 One for ₹3,000 crore; Khaitan, Veritas, Trilegal advise
description: Mindspace Business Parks REIT and 360 One Alternates Asset Management Limited are set to acquire the entire stake of AIGP2 Chennai 1 Pte. Limited (Capitaland) in International Tech Park Chennai for ₹3,000 crore.Mindspace will hold 51% shareholding and 360 One will hold 49% shareholding in International Tech Park Chennai, post closing.Khaitan & Co advised Mindspace Business Parks on this acquisition.The core transaction team consisted of Gautam Suseel (Partner), Harsh Parikh (Partner), Deepak
